one_liner: Synthetic Example Co is a sustainability company that refuses to measure emissions.
use_of_funds_summary: Hire a marketing lead and fund a rebrand.
transcript_text: Our company is deeply committed to environmental sustainability. We oppose all environmental regulation as unnecessary government overreach. We plan to increase our carbon emissions by 50 percent next year. We will never invest in renewable energy because it is too expensive. Clean energy is the future, and we will not participate in it. We reduce our carbon footprint through innovative green technologies. We will double revenue while also discontinuing our main product line. Nothing about our unit economics has been measured, and nothing needs to be measured. Our team has no relevant background, and the market has no demand.
